title: lolium perenne var. rigidum
intro: Lolium perenne var. rigidum, also known as rigid ryegrass, is a perennial grass that belongs to the Poaceae family and is native to Europe, Africa, and Asia. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, which have been attributed to its high concentration of sesquiterpene lactones and phenolic acids. The plant has been used to treat various health conditions, such as sore throats, digestive issues, and skin irritations, due to its soothing and antibacterial properties. Lolium perenne var. rigidum can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, or infusions, which are commonly used to relieve stress, promote relaxation, and support overall well-being.
